title: Curcumin and Inflammation After 40: What Women Should Know
seo_title: Curcumin and Inflammation After 40: What Women Should Know
meta_description: Inflammation rises after 40 as estrogen declines. Learn how liposomal curcumin reduces CRP, eases joint pain, and protects the brain with real clinical evidence.
tags: curcumin, inflammation, women over 40, joint pain, anti-inflammatory, liver tonic, turmeric
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: Estrogen has direct anti-inflammatory properties, so when levels decline after 40, chronic low-grade inflammation rises measurably. Liposomal curcumin works through the NF-kB and COX-2 pathways to reduce inflammation at the cellular level, with clinical evidence for CRP reduction, joint comfort, and brain protection.
